subject: Lionel Messi

versions.note: includes copyrighted childhood photo; uploader bears copyright/likeness risk

common.audio: ElevenLabs 'Brian' narration + synth ambient bed, -16 LUFS

method.approach: Unified continuous aging morph generated natively in Higgsfield (NOT separate clips wiggling).
method.model: kling3_0 (Kling v3.0), --start-image + --end-image, --mode std, --aspect_ratio 9:16, --duration 5, --sound off. ~7.5 credits per morph.
method.seamlessness: Each morph ends on the photo that begins the next morph, so concatenation (short dissolve) yields one continuous aging arc.
method.post: ffmpeg: lanczos upscale 720p->1080x1920, 30fps, title+end cards, narration+music mux, loudnorm.
method.why_not_seedance: seedance_2_0_mini start+end morph failed repeatedly; kling3_0 worked reliably. veo3_1_lite (8s) and seedance_2_0 full (up to 9 image refs) are alternatives.
method.backend_note: Higgsfield API returned intermittent HTTP 522 during this build; used submit-with-retry + tolerant polling. Failed/unsubmitted jobs not charged.

ai_disclosure: AI-generated/animated likeness of a real person, clearly labeled age-progression. No lip-sync 'speaking' deepfake; narration is a generic AI voice, not Messi's.
github_size_handling: Both files < 100 MB -> committed directly. No LFS/bucket needed.
